column1: * Standard deviations in parentheses for continuous variables.
* Absent Status: All Individuals absent from Hhat the time of survey both inside Nepal or outside of Nepal
* International Migrant Status: All individuals out of Nepal at the time of survey as well as individuals present at the time of survey, who had been out of Nepal for at least 3 months for work
* International Absentee Status: All individuals out of Nepal at the time of survey.
* Respondent Migrant Status: All individuals who travelled abroad for at least 3 months for work but are at home during survey.
* Internal Migrant Status: All individuals out of their home but inside the country at the time of survey
